title: Sora Dining Chair
description: A light oak dining chair with a curved back and matte finish for everyday meals. Stable, comfortable, and easy to pair with mixed table styles.

title: Lina Armchair
description: A low-profile lounge armchair with soft upholstery and a sculptural wooden frame. Ideal for living rooms, reading corners, and open-plan spaces.

title: Mira Bar Stool
description: A counter-height stool with a padded seat and footrest for kitchen islands and home bars. Minimal profile with a stable weighted base.

title: Hearth Dining Table
description: A rectangular dining table in warm oak with clean lines for modern interiors. Seats six comfortably and anchors open dining areas.

title: Oslo Coffee Table
description: A low coffee table with rounded edges and light wood tones. Sized for sofas and lounge seating in contemporary living rooms.

title: Nook Side Table
description: A compact round side table for next to a sofa, bed, or reading chair. Soft shape suits smaller spaces and layered layouts.

title: Arc Floor Lamp
description: A curved floor lamp with a fabric shade for living rooms and reading corners. Warm, diffused light with a small footprint.

title: Studio Desk Lamp
description: An adjustable desk lamp with a soft shade for focused work and evening reading. Compact base fits desks and nightstands.

title: Dome Pendant Black
description: A matte black dome pendant for kitchen islands, dining tables, and home offices. Focused downward glow with an industrial edge.

title: Dome Pendant Brass
description: A brushed brass dome pendant that adds warmth above dining areas and countertops. Works well in pairs over a table or bar.

title: Birch Wall Clock
description: A quiet birch wall clock with minimal markers for calm, uncluttered rooms. Easy to read without dominating the wall.

title: Takumi Desk Clock
description: A tabletop clock with a clean dial for desks, shelves, and bedside tables. Compact size suits workspaces and entry consoles.

title: Nord Entry Bench
description: A slim oak bench for entryways, the foot of the bed, or extra dining seating. Simple form with a natural finish for daily use.

title: Birch Wall Shelf
description: A floating wall shelf for books, plants, and display objects. Clean birch finish suits kitchens, offices, and bedrooms.

title: Concrete Planter
description: A textured concrete planter for indoor greenery and succulents. Neutral tone complements minimalist and natural decor.

title: Linen Throw Blanket
description: A lightweight linen throw for sofas, beds, and lounge chairs. Breathable weave adds texture without heavy bulk.

title: Ceramic Mug Set
description: A set of two matte ceramic mugs with a rounded handle for daily coffee and tea. Dishwasher-safe glaze in soft neutral tones.

title: Oak Tray
description: A solid oak serving tray for breakfast in bed, coffee tables, and ottoman styling. Raised edges keep items secure while carrying.

title: Woven Storage Basket
description: A hand-woven storage basket for blankets, magazines, and everyday clutter. Natural fibers add warmth to any room.

title: Minimal Coat Hook
description: A wall-mounted coat hook set in brushed metal for entryways and bedrooms. Clean lines hold bags, coats, and accessories neatly.
